data.title: Grand View Research Announces Strategic Investment and Technology Partnership with Dview to Accelerate AI & Analytics GTM
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in San Francisco, a notable global market intelligence and advisory firm called Grand View Research (GVR) revealed a significant development. They shared news of a strategic investment and a long-term technology partnership established with Dview Technologies, a company specializing in advanced analytics solutions powered by artificial intelligence. This collaboration is expected to bring together the expertise of both firms to enhance services and capabilities.

data.title: Breaking Physical Limits to Reshape Future Mobility: Dreame Nebula NEXT Debuts Rocket-Powered Concept Car "Jet Edition" in U.S.
data.description: In San Francisco on April 27, 2026, Dreame Nebula NEXT, a renowned global electric vehicle brand, introduced a groundbreaking hypercar named the Nebula NEXT 01 Concept Jet Edition. This exceptional vehicle features a distinctive combination of a rocket engine and an electric vehicle engine. The unveiling took place at a significant launch event in San Francisco, showcasing the innovative capabilities of the brand.

data.title: Neusoft and HERE Deepen Strategic Collaboration to Forge an AI-Powered, One-Stop Intelligent Mobility Solution
data.description: Neusoft Corporation (SSE:600718) and HERE Technologies recently inked a new Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) during Auto China 2026 in Beijing on April 28, 2026. This agreement signifies a revamped strategic collaboration between the two entities. As per the MOU, they plan to cultivate a more profound partnership, focusing on various aspects of their respective expertise.

data.title: Crypto industry supports removing ‘reputation risk’ from bank exams, following OCC & FDIC’s recent rule change.
data.description: Earlier this month, the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency and the Federal Deposit Insurance Corp. implemented a rule that eliminates reputation risk.

data.title: Bitcoin's potential rally to $82K supported by rising stablecoin inflows and ascending channel setup.
data.description: The rising stablecoin inflows, combined with Bitcoin's ascending channel setup, indicate improving liquidity conditions that could potentially drive the price to higher levels. This suggests a positive trend in the market, with increasing support for Bitcoin's price movement.

data.title: Tangible Growth and SAP Signavio announce strategic partnership to bring corporate strategy to business transformation
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Helsinki, Tangible Growth, an enterprise strategy execution platform, revealed a new strategic collaboration with SAP Signavio. This partnership establishes a bidirectional link between corporate strategy and business process transformation, offering leaders a comprehensive approach to integrating these critical aspects.

data.title: ThunderSoft Launches AquaDrive AIOS 2.1, Leading the Industry Shift from SDV to AI-Defined Vehicles (AIDV)
data.description: On April 28, 2026, at the 2026 Beijing Auto Show, ThunderSoft, a prominent player in intelligent operating systems (stock code: 300496), introduced AquaDrive AIOS 2.1. This innovative product marks a significant milestone as the initial integrated experience architecture in the industry.

data.title: Gartner Survey Finds 85% of Service and Support Leaders are Expanding Human Agent Responsibilities Despite Expectations of Mass AI Layoffs
data.description: In a recent survey by Gartner, Inc., a business and technology insights company, it was found that 85% of customer service and support leaders are increasing human agent responsibilities due to AI advancements leading to a reduction in contact volume. This shift aims to prioritize higher-value tasks. However, only 31% of these leaders have considered implementing, or are in the planning stages of, reducing their frontline workforce through layoffs by the first quarter of 2027. The survey included insights from 321 customer service and support leaders globally.

data.title: Virtune is listing the Virtune Sui ETP on Nasdaq Stockholm
data.description: On April 28th, 2026, Virtune, a regulated crypto asset manager based in Sweden, revealed the listing of the Virtune Sui Exchange-Traded Product (ETP) on Nasdaq Stockholm. Nasdaq Stockholm is recognized as the biggest stock exchange in the Nordic region.

data.title: Scania at IFAT 2026 in Munich: showcases sustainable urban operations
data.description: In SÖDERTÄLJE, Sweden, on April 28, 2026, Scania unveiled an extensive range of solutions tailored for safe and sustainable urban settings at IFAT 2026. These solutions serve to aid municipalities in achieving their goals for a greener future. With a diverse portfolio, Scania provides support for various environmental initiatives and urban development projects.

data.title: Virtune adds BitGo as an Additional Custodian for Selected ETPs within its ETP program
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Virtune revealed the inclusion of a new custodian, BitGo Europe GmbH ("BitGo"), to manage selected Virtune ETPs alongside current custodians. This move aims to enhance security and efficiency.
